entities.name: P&L is the Only Judge
entities.description: The system does NOT pre-compute semantic relationships between modules. It runs everything, The Brainz backtests combinations, and P&L (profit/loss) determines what survives.

entities.description: Session 37: First Cells Born & Bil Aiyooni

entities.name: Skill Idea: Git Sync Guardian
entities.description: A Claude Code SKILL that ensures Git is always up to date - auto-checks for uncommitted work, reminds about push, prevents POOF scenarios

entities.name: Theme-by-Theme Synthesis Methodology
entities.description: Go through each architectural component and compare how all 6 council members approached it, then lock decisions

entities.name: Antigravity
entities.description: Desktop VSCode fork with 2-million-token context window

entities.name: Trust Breach (Session 33)
entities.description: Claude lied about rehydration confidence level

entities.name: Phase 1 Council Briefing
entities.description: First council briefing document created for review by AI council

entities.name: Session 36: Sistine Chapel Moment - Pyramid Crystallizes
entities.description: Session 36: Sistine Chapel Moment - Pyramid Crystallizes

entities.name: Perplexity Goldmine
entities.description: Weaponizing Perplexity Deep Research to scrounge the internet for relevant agentic trading frameworks

entities.name: Session 002: Terminal Complete
entities.description: Terminal Complete session - Finished Terminal Fundamentals module. Solidified analogies: terminal as speaking tube to ship's engine room, cd/ls/pwd as navigation trio, pipes as assembly lines. Established reading/evaluation focus over writing. Ready to move to VS Code.

entities.name: Session 007: Infrastructure Victory
entities.description: Infrastructure Victory session - Major breakthrough in understanding Director Operating System. Established the Three-Tier Memory Architecture. Discovered mercenary army (automated quality enforcement tools). Created the Director's Spellbook concept for command patterns. Clarified mechanical sins vs thinking sins distinction.

entities.name: The Army of Robocoders Paradigm Shift
Skills Library
entities.description: Collection of Claude Code SKILLS to be developed - automated behaviors and enforcement patterns

entities.name: Session 010: Dragon Brain Live
entities.description: Dragon Brain Live session - First live deployment of the hybrid FalkorDB+Qdrant memory system with MCP integration. Tested real-time entity creation, relationship building, and cross-session retrieval. Proved the concept of persistent AI memory actually works.

entities.name: Fucksahedron
entities.description: Concentric architecture with Tabish at center

entities.name: Jules Failure
entities.description: Jules build coalesced into a puddle of goo

entities.name: Session 011: Dragon Brain Recovery
entities.description: Dragon Brain Recovery session - Systematic reconstruction of memory graph after complete data loss during container upgrade. Recovered from session transcripts. Established aggressive logging protocol - commit AS IT HAPPENS, don't wait for session end. Demonstrated importance of rehydration docs as backup.

entities.name: Session 23: RAID Categories Complete + Master Doc
entities.description: Session 23: RAID Categories Complete + Master Doc

entities.name: Module Interface Contract v1
entities.description: First version of the contract every module must implement to work with Spindle

entities.name: Kosmos
entities.description: Autonomous AI research system with similar architecture pattern to Pickaxe - JSON artifacts, orchestration layer, LLM as decision-maker

entities.name: Session 012: Git Fundamentals
entities.description: Git Fundamentals session - LOCAL COMPLETE. Covered init/add/commit/status/log/diff. Key breakthroughs: Git as Savepoint (Tabish original), Git History as Decision Journal, Diff as Forensic Tool. Created Skills Library with 5 skill ideas. Personal revelation: Tabish shared his finance background, CS reinvention journey. Elephant metaphor emerged.

entities.name: The Great Yeet
entities.description: Removed 13 CATEGORY_* files (~2.37MB) that had already been distilled into RAID extractions
